name: Wirken: skill-dir-resident binary executed
message:
Wirken agent ran an exec command whose argv contains a configured skill_dir prefix.

Detection: skill_dir_exec (4)
Severity baseline: high

Fields to pivot on: @wirken.session_id, @wirken.event.agent_id, @wirken.event.adapter_id, @wirken.event.sender_id, @argv_skill_dir, @argv_command.

The `@argv_skill_dir_match` and `@argv_skill_dir` fields require a Datadog log parsing pipeline that compares the argv against a reference table of skill_dir prefixes. The reference table name is `wirken_skill_dirs`. An empty table makes this monitor never fire; operators should populate it (see datadog/README.md) or disable the monitor.

@security-team
